arts.ttl: Middlesbrough transfer failed after Boro ‘invented problem he never had’ – Player unhappy with club
arts.sum: Yaya Sanogo has told So Foot he came close to joining Middlesbrough earlier in his career. The Frenchman spent four years at Arsenal and struggled to make an impact at the north London club. They sent him out on loan before releasing him at the end of the 2016/17 season. arts.ttl: Michael Dawson's conversation with brother Andy ahead of Middlesbrough trip for Hull interim boss
arts.sum: Former England international Michael Dawson admits it's going to be 'hard' for his brother to lead Hull City at Middlesbrough on Saturday, with Andy Dawson placed in interim charge following the sacking of Tim Walter. Andy will take charge of the Tigers on Saturday as they look to arrest a slump in form that's seen them lose their last four games, with no wins in their last nine.

arts.sum: Lewie Coyle admits Hull City are not in a good spot but says he will do his best to help lift the players for Saturday's trip to Middlesbrough. People in general are a lot quieter than maybe I'm used to but I'll get around the boys and see if they need anything.

arts.sum: With Boro struggling to click after recent positive form, however, Hamilton couldn't make an impact as his disappointing start since his summer move from Manchester City continues.
